message:
feat(membrane): update runtime-math kernels and membrane validation for expanded ABI

Update the Transparent Safety Membrane layer to support expanded native
implementations:

- arena/ptr_validator: validation adjustments for new ABI entrypoints
- runtime_math kernels (derived_tstructure, info_geometry, kernel_mmd,
  operator_norm, spectral_gap, stein_discrepancy, transfer_entropy,
  wasserstein_drift): improved numerical stability and cross-family
  consistency checks across all runtime-math control kernels

These changes ensure the membrane's online decision-making and
deterministic admission gates remain coherent with the expanded set of
natively-implemented libc symbols.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
